title: Do not print empty occurrence
text: Do not print empty occurrence Indicates whether printing is suppressed if there is no data available for this object. Valid values are True (default) or False . Description If the entity contains no data when the component is printed, Uniface does not print the object or its border. Applies To Entity Frame Related Links Area Frames and Lines Area frames are objects that can be used to group or separate the contents of a Form component. Entities An Entity defines a logical data aggregation. It usually represents a relational database table, but it is possible to define non-database entities for transient data, reusable user interface controls, or other application structures.
